# 44c805a9-efed-412b-9e45-b7fb040e2ef2 — Auto-Generated WebdriverIO (WDIO) Tests

Generated by [TestQ](https://testq.ai). Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten on next push.

> Uses [WebdriverIO v8](https://webdriver.io/) with Mocha + expect-webdriverio.
> Tests run against Chrome by default. Set `CI=true` for headless mode.
> ChromeDriver is managed automatically — no manual driver setup required.

## Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+
- Chrome browser installed
- A running instance of the application under test

## Setup

```bash
npm install
```

> **Note:** `wdio-chromedriver-service` (included) auto-downloads and starts the correct
> ChromeDriver version for your Chrome installation. No PATH changes needed.

## Run Tests

```bash
# Run all tests (headed browser)
npm test

# Run all tests headless (CI mode)
npm run test:headless

# Run a single spec file
npm run test:single -- --spec ./test/specs/{pbi-id}/{scenario}.test.js
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description                    | Default               |
|----------|--------------------------------|-----------------------|
| BASE_URL | Application base URL           | http://localhost:3000 |
| CI       | Set to `true` for headless mode | —                     |

## Project Structure

```
test/
  specs/
    {pbi-id}/                  ← spec files grouped by PBI
      {scenario}.test.js       ← one Mocha describe/it per scenario
  locators/
    {pbi-id}.locators.js       ← CSS selectors for all pages of a PBI
  pages/
    {pbi-id}.page.js           ← WDIO Page Object (getter pattern)
    index.js                   ← aggregates all page objects
  utils/
    helpers.js                 ← shared WDIO utility functions
wdio.conf.js                   ← WDIO runner configuration
package.json
```

## Writing Tests

Page objects use the WDIO getter pattern:

```js
// test/pages/login.page.js
const { locators } = require('../locators/login.locators');

class LoginPage {
  get usernameInput() { return $(locators.usernameInput); }
  get passwordInput() { return $(locators.passwordInput); }
  get submitButton()  { return $(locators.submitButton); }

  async login(username, password) {
    await this.usernameInput.setValue(username);
    await this.passwordInput.setValue(password);
    await this.submitButton.click();
  }
}
module.exports = new LoginPage();
```

Specs import the page object and use expect-webdriverio assertions:

```js
// test/specs/login/login.test.js
const LoginPage = require('../../pages/login.page');

describe('Login', () => {
  before(async () => { await browser.url('/login'); });

  it('should login successfully', async () => {
    await LoginPage.login('user@example.com', 'pass');
    await expect(browser).toHaveUrlContaining('/dashboard');
    await expect($('.welcome')).toBeDisplayed();
  });

  after(async () => { await browser.deleteCookies(); });
});
```
